notes: All network requests routed through centralized api.ts Axios instance (interceptors: bearer token + silent refresh).
Amounts parsed through parseDecimal() → toFixed(2) before submission, guarding DECIMAL(18,2) DB precision.
Type filter exposes only income/expense; transfer rows are rendered but excluded from type-aggregate filter chips to prevent blending paired transfer flows into individual sums.
Bulk delete batches IDs in chunks of ≤50 per API constraint.
Pagination built server-side from GET /transactions response envelope.
